name: Teriyaki Wing Dings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the lemon juice concentrate, catsup, soy sauce, vegetable oil, pepper, 2 tablespoons of brown sugar, and garlic powder.
2. Place the chicken wings in a shallow baking dish. Pour the marinade over the chicken, making sure it is evenly coated.
3. Refrigerate the chicken for at least overnight, turning occasionally to ensure even coating.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Arrange the marinated chicken on a rack in an aluminum foil-lined shallow baking pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 40 to 45 minutes, basting occasionally with the marinade.
